findings.summary: Production /embed/earn STILL serves frame-ancestors 'none' + X-Frame-Options DENY — the supposed v0.7.54 P0-001 fix is broken in prod. The desktop Tauri webview cannot load this surface, so EVERYTHING shipped in v0.7.55 (PayoutLadder, BonusEarnings, mission filter) is unreachable to actual users.
findings.evidence: curl -sI https://account.liquidclips.app/embed/earn → 'content-security-policy: frame-ancestors none' + 'x-frame-options: DENY'. The negative-lookahead pattern '/((?!embed/).*)' written into next.config.ts:31 is being parsed by Next.js path-to-regexp and is matching /embed/earn (the catch-all wins because both source rules match). The fuchsia 'embed/:path*' override on line 21 cascades with the catch-all but the catch-all DENY wins per Next.js header-merge semantics — exactly the cascade pattern the comment on line 14 says was fixed.
findings.suggested_fix: Stop using a regex catch-all source. Use the `missing` cookie/header trick OR move the DENY into a Next.js middleware that EXCLUDES /embed/* explicitly. The current path-to-regexp interpretation of '/((?!embed/).*)' is NOT a negative lookahead — path-to-regexp doesn't honor lookaheads. Verify with a curl probe BEFORE claiming fixed.

findings.summary: BonusLedgerImport form omits the `liquid_clips_user_id` field entirely, so every imported row has liquid_clips_user_id=null. The clipper-facing GET /bonus-ledger/me filter is `liquid_clips_user_id == user.id`, so EVERY imported row is invisible to the clipper it tracks. The whole Phase 1 closes a loop nobody can see.
findings.evidence: AdminHQ.tsx lines 1830-1841 declare the form state with no liquid_clips_user_id field. BonusLedgerImport submit (line 1853-1860) JSON.stringify's `form` directly. Backend admin.py:1457 import_whop_submission_to_ledger has no email→user_id resolution (grep User.email in admin.py only finds the user search route at line 730 + the field assignment at 1507/1529 from payload). Result: row.liquid_clips_user_id stays null. bonus_ledger.py:87 filter excludes the row from the clipper's response.
findings.reproduce: 1) Import a row via Admin HQ with email=clipper@example.com. 2) Sign in as that clipper. 3) GET /bonus-ledger/me returns {rows: []}. 4) Verify in DB: SELECT liquid_clips_user_id FROM reward_bonus_ledger WHERE email='clipper@example.com' → NULL.
findings.suggested_fix: Either (a) auto-resolve `payload.email` → User.id server-side in import_whop_submission_to_ledger before writing the row, OR (b) add a `liquid_clips_user_id` text input to the BonusLedgerImport form with a 'find by email' lookup helper, OR (c) document explicitly that admin must populate liquid_clips_user_id via direct DB write and surface that warning in the import form. Without one of these, the Earn UI BonusEarnings tile is a dead surface.

findings.summary: All 9 seeded community channels ship with whop_channel_id=null. A paid user upgrading to access premium rooms sees 'Coming soon' on EVERY room — including the rooms the upgrade gate sold them. Free user upgrade → paid user with zero working rooms = a confirmed dead-end.
findings.evidence: seed_community_channels.py never sets whop_channel_id (line 3 comment confirms 'whop_channel_id stays null in Phase 1'). CommunityTab.tsx:260 computes coming = !c.whop_channel_id, line 314-322 renders 'Coming soon' pill with no action when coming=true. Phase 1 ships ZERO populated whop_channel_ids — paid clipper sees Coming soon on every room they paid for. Free user sees Upgrade → on paid rooms, upgrades, then sees Coming soon on the same rooms.
findings.reproduce: 1) Sign in as a paid user. 2) Open Community tab. 3) Every card shows 'Coming soon' pill. 4) No room is openable.
findings.suggested_fix: Either (a) populate whop_channel_id for at minimum the two free-paid rooms (announcements + free-clipper-lobby) and the two paid_core rooms (premium-rewards-hq + affiliate-growth-room) in the seed BEFORE shipping, OR (b) gate ALL paid_core/mission rooms behind a 'launching soon' banner above the section so the user understands the empty state is universal not their tier. The current state ships a tab whose advertised value is invisible.

findings.summary: When tier === null (signed-in user but /affiliate/me failed → tier resolves to null per page.tsx fetchAffiliate catch path), BonusEarnings falls through to the JWT path, fetches /bonus-ledger/me, and renders the empty-state copy 'Submit a clip through Whop' to a possibly-free user — making a false promise that bonus tracking is active for them.
findings.evidence: BonusEarnings.tsx:71 isPremium = !!tier && PREMIUM_TIERS.includes(...). When tier=null, isPremium=false. Line 102 'if (tier && !isPremium)' → skips upsell tile because tier is null. Line 158 'if (!jwt)' → skeleton. Once JWT lands, fetch runs. Line 200 list.length===0 → renders empty state 'submit a clip through Whop. When it's approved we mirror it here'. A free user reading this is being told their bonus ledger is live.
findings.reproduce: 1) In page.tsx:fetchAffiliate, mock the /affiliate/me call to throw → return tier=null. 2) Sign in a free user. 3) BonusEarnings renders the empty-state with the 'we mirror it here' promise rather than the upsell tile.
findings.suggested_fix: Treat tier===null as 'unknown' and render a quiet 'tier loading' skeleton or a soft fallback 'your bonus tracking will load once we verify your tier' instead of the empty-state-with-promise. Or: when tier===null and rows.length===0, fall back to the free-tier upsell tile copy.

findings.summary: The mark-paid flow is a native window.prompt(). Admin cannot edit notes, cannot re-mark-paid an already-paid row, and cannot record WHY they paid out-of-band. Hostile UX for the only Phase 1 write action.
findings.evidence: AdminHQ.tsx:1676 window.prompt(...) asks ONLY for approved_views. The backend BonusMarkPaidPayload (admin.py:1349) accepts {approved_views, notes} but the UI never sends notes. Line 1801 'paid' rows render bonus_marked_paid_at as a static date with no edit action — once paid, the row is frozen even though admin.py:1571 supports re-saves with new approved_views.
findings.reproduce: 1) Open Admin HQ → Bonus Ledger. 2) Mark a row paid via the prompt — notes field unused. 3) Try to edit the same row — no UI affordance. Must re-import to change anything.
findings.suggested_fix: Replace the prompt() with a small inline editor (popover or row-expansion) that takes both approved_views AND notes, AND allows re-saving a paid row (the backend already supports it).

findings.summary: The mission_lane filter dropdown hard-codes lane names ('training' / 'main' / 'proof'). If an admin imports a row with a different lane string (e.g. capitalised, or a new mission lane the campaign added), the filter silently excludes it. No 'other' option.
findings.evidence: AdminHQ.tsx:1722-1726 hard-codes <option value='training'> / <option value='main'> / <option value='proof'>. The import form (line 1892) free-texts mission_lane with a placeholder hint only. Backend filter (admin.py:1430) does exact string match. An admin who types 'Training' gets a row excluded from the filter forever.
findings.reproduce: Import a row with mission_lane='Training' (capitalised). Filter to 'uncle daniel · training'. Row missing.
findings.suggested_fix: Either (a) compute the dropdown from the actual mission_lane values present in the rows, OR (b) lowercase mission_lane server-side at import, OR (c) replace the dropdown with a free-text filter.

findings.summary: Anonymous /community/channels callers (no clerk_user_id) get every paid room with locked=false. The desktop CommunityTab ignores the backend locked field and re-computes client-side, so this is currently masked — but the wire contract is misleading and a future API consumer could trust the false 'open' state.
findings.evidence: community.py:128 sets locked = _is_locked(...) if viewer_tier else False. For viewer_tier=None this returns False unconditionally, even for paid rooms. desktop CommunityTab.tsx:138 recomputes locked itself so the issue is contained today, but contract is wrong.
findings.reproduce: curl -s 'https://api.liquidclips.app/community/channels' | jq '.channels[] | {slug, required_tier, locked}' → every row shows locked:false.
findings.suggested_fix: When viewer_tier is None, emit locked=null (not false). The Pydantic schema already declares locked: bool | None. Update the assignment on line 128 to None so unauthenticated callers get an honest 'unknown' signal.

findings.summary: Bare 'c.premium_rpm_cents > 0' comparison assumes the column has a numeric value. If a row exists from before the v0.7.55 ALTER ran (transient deploy window or a SQLite dev DB that uses Base.metadata.create_all which never adds new columns to existing tables), Python raises TypeError on None > 0 and the entire /campaigns response 500s.
findings.evidence: campaigns.py:171 'if is_premium and c.premium_rpm_cents > 0'. The model declares default=0 nullable=False, but Base.metadata.create_all (junior-backend/app/main.py:50) does NOT add columns to existing tables in SQLite dev. Postgres ALTER lines 204-206 run only in lifespan with engine.dialect.name=='postgresql' (line 288).
findings.reproduce: 1) Local dev with a pre-v0.7.55 SQLite junior.db. 2) Start backend. 3) GET /campaigns?clerk_user_id=anything → 500 'unsupported operand type(s) for >: NoneType and int'.
findings.suggested_fix: Coerce: 'if is_premium and (c.premium_rpm_cents or 0) > 0'. Three lines below do the same coercion correctly. Apply the same defensive pattern.

smoke_tests_run.name: GET-embed-earn-headers
smoke_tests_run.output: frame-ancestors 'none' + X-Frame-Options DENY — confirms P0-001 still broken in production

smoke_tests_run.name: GET-campaigns-public
smoke_tests_run.output: 200 OK; old shape (no funnel fields) — expected pre-deploy; campaign rows render

smoke_tests_run.name: GET-community-channels
smoke_tests_run.output: 404 Not Found — expected, backend not deployed; no 5xx so non-deploy failure ruled out

smoke_tests_run.name: GET-healthcheck
smoke_tests_run.output: api.liquidclips.app and api.jnremployee.com both return 405 Allow:GET — backend is live

smoke_tests_run.name: iron-gate-grep
smoke_tests_run.output: no IRON GATE sentinels touched in any of the 14 changed files

smoke_tests_run.name: String-e-annotation-grep
smoke_tests_run.output: all 7 String(e) additions carry an allow-raw-error annotation, no slips

free_user_on_earn: ENABLES: see PayoutLadder $1 free / $4 locked premium; mission filter chips (when ≥2 missions); upgrade CTA on locked campaigns; BonusEarnings upsell tile.
PREVENTS: free user from clicking 'Submit through Whop' — only paid users get that CTA per SponsoredCarousel.tsx:520; no path to mistakenly submit a clip thinking they'll get bonus.
BREAKS: nothing on Earn rendering — but the entire surface is BLOCKED from rendering inside the desktop webview (P0-001).
STRANDS: free user clicks Upgrade → posts lc:open-auth panel=upgrade → desktop should open Clerk upgrade flow. If desktop bridge swallows the postMessage (no handler attached), user is stuck.
free_user_on_community: ENABLES: see Announcements + Free Clipper Lobby + Uncle Daniel Clips open cards; see paid rooms as Upgrade preview tiles.
STRANDS: 'Coming soon' on free_paid rooms (whop_channel_id null in seed) is a quiet dead-end — no retry, no notify CTA. Free user just sees the room exists with no action. P1-002.
premium_stalled_jwt: ENABLES: amber 'bonus ledger paused — reopen Earn from the Liquid Clips sidebar, or retry'. (No retry button in BonusEarnings — only in BountyList.)

BREAKS: the user instructions say 'or retry' but there's NO retry button on the stalled state in BonusEarnings.tsx:143-156. Copy promises a button that doesn't exist. Minor honesty drift — P2 (not logged separately, fold into P1-001 fix).
STRANDS: user closes Earn, reopens from sidebar → bridge re-fires; that's the documented escape hatch. Works.
admin_importing_collision: ENABLES: idempotent re-import patches the existing row (backend admin.py:1467-1521).
PREVENTS: duplicate ledger rows for the same whop_submission_id.
BREAKS: when collision happens, the import sub-form DOES clear (onSaved calls setShowImport(false) + load) AdminHQ.tsx:1738-1741. UI handles this correctly.
STRANDS: admin gets no visible signal that a re-import happened vs a create. Both close the form and reload the table. Acceptable for Phase 1 — recorded as observation, not finding.
admin_mark_paid: ENABLES: window.prompt sets approved_views, mark-paid sets bonus_payout_status='paid'.
BREAKS: notes never sent (P2-001). No re-edit of approved row (P2-001).
STRANDS: admin can't fix a mistyped view count once paid — must re-import.

verdict_rationale: One P0 (broken frame-ancestors in production) prevents the entire Earn surface from rendering in the desktop webview — every v0.7.55 UI change is invisible to users until fixed. Three P1s (P1-001 invisible ledger rows, P1-002 zero working community rooms, P1-003 false-positive empty state) each render a major user journey dead on arrival. P2s are polish — non-blocking.
